/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address,undefined "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_codec.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_chain_id.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_crypto.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_vrf.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_address.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_consensus.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_sortition_v2.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_p2p.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_addrman.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_monetary.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_state_commitment.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_smt.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_bonding.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_finality_certificate.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_snapshot.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_validator_v4.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_mempool.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_hardening.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_protocol_scope.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_genesis.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_paths.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_keystore.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_mainnet_characterization.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_integration.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-tests.dir/tests/test_lightserver.cpp.o" -o selfcoin-tests  libselfcoin_core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librocksdb.so
